name: Cannoli (Gtkg62a)
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Grated orange or lemon rind
2 tbsp Miniature chocolate bits, or Shaved semi-sweet chocolate
1 tbsp Candied citron, or glaced Fruit
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, salt, sugar, citrus rind and butter in a bowl and blend well.
2. Gradually add Marsala wine by the teaspoonful until the dough is stiff.
3. Chill for 2 hours.
4. Roll the dough on a lightly-floured board into a large rectangle.
5. Cut into 4-inch squares.
6. Wrap each square around cannoli tubes so that two corners fold over and two corners point outward.
7. Brush the touching corners with egg white to ensure they stick together.
8. Deep fry in hot oil until golden.
9. Remove from tubes and fill with the prepared filling.
10. Makes 10 to 12 cannoli. If you don't have cannoli tubes, make 4-inch diameter tubes out of heavy-duty aluminum foil and fold the dough accordingly.
